data.content: Implemented on branch foolery-6a0d at commit c98c9c455d12. Updated the lightbox header so the title editor uses the full remaining header width while the Close button stays shrink-0, and restyled the editing input to be borderless and chrome-free so it reads like inline text editing. Added a regression test covering the reserved close-button space and full-width chrome-less editor classes. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (passes with one existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
